title: Zhaoyaojing Gate Output (v0.4)
description: Machine-readable output of the zhaoyaojing Phase 0 Gate and full pipeline. Consumed by CI/CD pipelines, agent orchestrators, and pre-execution hooks.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version, locked to 0.4.0 for v0.4 release

verdict.description: Gate outcome. PASSED = allow agent execution; BLOCKED = stop, remediation required; WARNING = allow with explicit ack and risk-accepted trace

readinessScore.description: Aggregate input quality score, 0-100. Calculated by SKILL.md Phase 0 Step 0.3

threshold.description: PASSED threshold. readinessScore >= threshold AND no critical AND no G18 irreversible critical => PASSED

I.description: Independent: self-contained, no implicit dialog dependency

N.description: Negotiable: allows agent to propose alternatives

E.description: Estimable: complexity assessable, no subjective words

findings.description: Full list of detected gaps. Empty when verdict=PASSED with no warnings.

id.description: Stable gap id: G{family}-{idx}#{shortHash}. family MUST be a G1-G18 dimension code (e.g. G14.M, G9.2, G16). Business-domain codes (GSEC/GLOGIC/etc.) are forbidden from v0.4 onwards.

gap.description: Gap dimension code (G1-G18 + optional sub-item). See references/gap-taxonomy.md

severity.description: P0 = blocking, P1 = high risk, P2 = improvement, P3 = informational, Drop = dismissed false positive

blocked.description: True if this finding contributes to BLOCKED verdict. Only P0 and certain P1 set blocked=true.

evidence.description: Minimal reproducible excerpt or verbatim quote from the artifact

agentSuccessRateDelta.description: Estimated impact on agent success rate, e.g. '-40%' or 'N/A'. NEVER fabricate; cite source from gap-taxonomy.md or mark as unknown.

rootCause.description: Mapped failure root cause from references/gap-taxonomy.md G1-G18

slot.description: Slot name to fill, e.g. 'measurable_target', 'business_term:核销'

prompt.description: Template with placeholders, e.g. '转化率从___提升到___，统计口径为___'

options.description: MAX 4 options (red-line 3). Always include D) skip-with-trace.

appealHint.description: How user can dismiss as false positive, e.g. 'Reply DROP: <reason>'

recheckCommand.description: Optional shell command to verify remediation, e.g. 'rg -n "dedupKey" src/'

passCondition.description: Human-readable condition to flip verdict to PASSED, e.g. 'Resolve all 2 blocked findings, readinessScore must reach 80'

artifactGitSha.description: Git sha of artifact at scan time (when applicable)

feedbackPath.description: Path to artifact-scoped feedback.jsonl, e.g. '<artifact-root>/.zhaoyaojing/feedback.jsonl'. Per red-line 8, MUST NOT be global.

impact.rootCause: 任务定义模糊 (~25% agent failures)

remediation.prompt: 转化率从___提升到___，统计口径为___

options.label: 直接填写
options.example: 从 2.1% 提升到 3.0%（口径：7 日滑动窗口）

options.label: 提供示例
options.example: 附 1 个达标场景的指标数据

examples.passCondition: Resolve 1 blocked finding; readinessScore must reach 80
